name: zeno-ui
description: Workspace for the Zeno UI packages.

scripts.build:packages: yarn workspace @zeno-ui/tokens build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/animations build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/theme-engine build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/tailwind-preset build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/nativewind-preset build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/theme-runtime build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/react build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/react-native build
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @zeno-ui/animations typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/nativewind-preset typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/react typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/react-native typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/tailwind-preset typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/theme-engine typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/theme-runtime typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/tokens typecheck
